_comment: Facebook direct-intake dry-run seed. Reuses the existing CampaignRoutingRule registry and seed script (no new models). IDs live here, never in app code. Destination subaccount is a placeholder the operator must set to the configured Demo GHL location. Seed with: ROUTING_RULES_SEED_PATH=./prisma/facebook-routing-rules.example.json pnpm run seed:routing-demo
